utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 keys. Now verify full specification details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: named package, separates Physical (€105/month) and Mental (€60/month) with total €165/month. This satisfies details and costs.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: coverage for professional photography equipment at €60/month. It specifies cost but focuses on equipment, not home/contents as a whole. The format explicitly says home/contents; equipment-only may be insufficient. It's not fully specified as home/contents insurance with costs.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided: plan name and €50/month cost. Satisfies.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided: Automated billing setup but no cost stated. Lacks costs; not fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: €275/month only, no annual breakdown. Not complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists: (1) InsurePlus Standard Package for health: physical at €105/month and mental health at €60/month. These correspond to 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health and 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health. (2) LifeFirst Standard Coverage for professional photography equipment at €60/month aligns with property_protection.home_content 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage'. (3) LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan at €50/month matches mobility_coverage.travel_insurance 'LifeFirst Standard Plan'. Automated billing has no rating in ground truth. Therefore, map these four items to their ratings.
